text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The final part—running. Our anchors are on their last few laps! In the
lead is Team Bakushin's Kitasan Black!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: (Bakushin O gave me the lead.)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(She took on the exhausting cycling leg. Not only that, she chose the
longest route, the one everyone said she's least suited to, and she
finished it!)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: (I... I won't give up either! I believe I can do it!)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Kita picked up her pace! If she widens the gap any farther, she might
just outpace everyone!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No, this drama's climax is yet to come. Top Road will surely put on a
dazzling performance in the last scene!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan won't shake us off that easy. I know Bright will get a grip on
her!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(According to Matikanetannhauser, Kitasan has high endurance and a
sharp turn of foot. It'll be tough if she gets any farther ahead.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: (But I have to stay in control of my own pace. Which means...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: (Bright sped up! It's still early for me, but I can't get left behind!)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright and Narita Top Road have picked up the pace! They're
gradually closing the gap!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: (They're... getting closer!)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff, wheeze!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: (I will catch up! I will break away!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
(They believe in me—Opera O, Doto, and Ayabe. I'll show them
they're right!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: (This is for Big Sister Ryan!)

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text:
RAAAAAH!
DAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright and Narita Top Road are closing in on Kitasan Black!
Can she hold out?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: (Got to keep my lead! Keep running! Faster, until the end!)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: (I'm gonna finish this!)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: RAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Kitasan Black accelerates again! Will it be enough?!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Kitasan Black crosses the finish line! She's won it! Kitasan Black wins!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: The Tracen Academy Team Triathlon goes to Team Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Bright, you came so close.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Yes. I suppose I'll bring home glory next time.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hm? You seem kind of happy about it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I am. Until I took part in this contest, I felt a little inferior compared
to the others.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
But... it was a really close race! A little bit longer, and I think I could
have done it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Through our training and friendly rivalry, I grew even stronger than I
could've imagined!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Sounds like it was worth it, then. I'm glad!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It most certainly was! Special Week, Matikanetannhauser... Thank you
very much.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
During practice and the real contest, I couldn't have done it without
you.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: No way! I haven't done anything for you to thank me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You gave us an awesome head start, Spe. And Tannhauser, your drink
gave me a great energy boost!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Whaaa! So it worked! Being on this team has given me some courage
and confidence!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah! It was really fun getting to train and compete with this team!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teehee! On that note, I'd like to invite you to a reception at the
Mejiro estate. We'll prepare an all-you-can-eat banquet! ♪

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hey.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: ...Hi. I didn't make it in time...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-i-it's all my fault, sorryyyyy! Even though Ayabe came in first, I had
to go and mess it all up with my clumsiness!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Huh?! It wasn't your fault, Doto! I should've worded that better. Sorry!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That's right! We made a scene like no other! And we have the special
award to prove it!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: We put on a fantastic intermedio show!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: With any luck, the main story will be even more enthralling!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Once was more than enough.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! Only the goddesses of fate know what's in store for us!
Now, I'll see you later. Ciao!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, w-w-wait, Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
(...I want to be worthy of you all—as your friend and rival, now and
forever!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: (Above anyone else, I want to win against you all!)

text_block_list.name: Polite Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan, Satono—congratulations on your win! You're amazing for
winning against the older students!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe. See, you don't know until you try!

text_block_list.name: Pessimistic Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
You two... are truly amazing! W-watching you... brought a tear to my
eye!

text_block_list.name: Polite Umamusume
text_block_list.text: You really inspired me! I'm going to push myself to try new things too!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoa, whoa! You did it, Kitasan! That was a wicked upset you
pulled out there!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: You ran a fantastic race! What a triumphant show of spirit!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! I was so absorbed in the moment, I'm not even sure how I
ran myself...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yep, leave it to good ol' passion to turn the tables! All right, let's toss
you up in the air! You over there, join us!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. They did a number on you, huh? But it's sweet of them to
celebrate with us!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! It reminded me of something—how I felt the first time I saw
Teio race.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Her running inspired me. It made me want to run just like her!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: So, has today brought you one step closer to your goal?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yes, thanks to our older teammates! They've given me so much
courage!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Next time, I want to inspire others with my own strength. Just like
Teio, my dad, and our teammates, I want to make everyone smile with
my running!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: And I want to run with everyone again too!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Does that include me?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Of course it does! Let's keep running together!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: "You know, Mom, Tracen Academy is a wonderful place."

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
"There are soooo many athletes I'd love to race against here!
Achieving my goal won't be easy, but that's also what makes it
exciting!"

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
"I can't let myself fall behind. Because I'm going to become the best
Umamusume in Japan!"

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: That's it! I'm gonna do this!
